message:
feat(gateway): add developer utilities service (giil, csctf)

Implements the Developer Utilities Auto-Install feature:
- Add utilities.service.ts with detection, installation, and execution
- Create /utilities REST endpoints for listing, status, doctor, and run
- Integrate giil for cloud image downloads
- Integrate csctf for AI chat conversation archiving
- Add output directory validation for security
- Include 15 tests for the service

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
